page_subtitle: Drop a supplier invoice (PDF or image). We'll extract the fields and pre-fill a new PO so you only have to review and save.
drag_hint: Click or drag an invoice file to this area
accept_hint: Single PDF, JPG, PNG, or WEBP. Up to {{size}} MB.

errors.title: OCR could not finish
errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection and retry.
errors.no_stream: Server did not return a streaming response.
errors.stream_aborted: The upload was interrupted. Please try again.
errors.generic: OCR failed. Please fill the PO form manually.
errors.AI_TIMEOUT: OCR took too long. Please try a smaller / clearer image, or fill the form manually.
errors.AI_FEATURE_DISABLED: OCR is currently disabled for your organization. Contact an admin.
errors.AI_DAILY_QUOTA_EXCEEDED: You've reached today's OCR quota. Resets at midnight UTC.
errors.RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Too many requests. Please wait a minute and try again.
errors.UNSUPPORTED_MIME_TYPE: This file type is not supported. Use PDF, JPG, PNG, or WEBP.
errors.AI_ERROR: OCR failed. Please fill the form manually.
